deploy.preDeployCommand: for i in $(seq 1 15); do python -c "import django, os; os.environ.setdefault('DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE','crm.settings'); django.setup(); from django.db import connection; connection.ensure_connection(); print('DB ready')" 2>/dev/null && break || echo "Waiting for DB... attempt $i" && sleep 3; done && python manage.py migrate --noinput
